content:
=== Wrapper line count ===
2392 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v

=== Lines 2360-2400 (context around the problem) ===
// Compute subsystem instantiation
mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss u_core (
    .clk(clk_in),
    .reset_n(reset_n_xres_h_n),
    .tck(1'b0),
    .tms(1'b0),
    .tdi(1'b0),
    .trst_n(1'b0),
    .qspi_sck(),
    .qspi_ce_n(),
    .qspi_din(4'b0),
    .qspi_dout(),
    .qspi_douten(),
    .clk_rst_pwr_prdata(32'b0),
    .clk_rst_pwr_pready(1'b1),
    .clk_rst_pwr_pslverr(1'b0),
    .io_cfg_ss_prdata(32'b0),
    .io_cfg_ss_pready(1'b1),
    .io_cfg_ss_pslverr(1'b0),
    .gpioa_in(w_gpioa_in),
    .gpioa_out(w_gpioa_out),
    .gpioa_oe(w_gpioa_oe),
    .gpiob_in(w_gpiob_in),
    .gpiob_out(w_gpiob_out),
    .gpiob_oe(w_gpiob_oe),
    .gpioc_in(w_gpioc_in),
    .gpioc_out(w_gpioc_out),
    .gpioc_oe(w_gpioc_oe)
);

endmodule

`default_nettype wire
